titleStmt.title: SII 17.65: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 65. (A.R. No. 59 of 1904). KURUGŌḌU, BELLARY TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: On two faces of a pillar in the bazaar street.
This is dated Śaka 1435, Āṅgirasa, Āśvija, śu. 15, lunar eclipse corresponding to 1512 A.D., September 25. The Śaka year was current.
It records that Mallamamma, the wife of Mallapanāyaka of Kuṟagōḍu had the well of the temple of god Śānta-Mallikārjuna repaired and made a gift of land to the god for a flower-garden.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī
svastiśrī jayābhyudaya
śālivāhana ṣaka va
ruṣa 1435 neya
Aṁgirasa saṁvatsa
rada Asvija śu 15
sōmōparāga puṁ
ṇyakāladalu kuṟa
gōḍa basavaṇa nā
yakara makaḷu malla
pa nāyakara dharma
patniyāda ballaku
ṁdi mādhapa nāyaka
ra magaḷāda mallamaṁ
manū kuṟugōḍa grā
make Iśāṁnyadiki
na pūje pāḷa śā
ṁta mallikārjuna dē
vara dēvālaya bā
viyanu jiṁrnnodhāra
va māḍi dēvara hū
vinatōṭaka biṭide
dēvasthānake mūḍalu
bāviyiṁ I baḍa
galāda tōṭastaḷa
vōkuḷada holaṁ
nu tamage Iha pa
ragaḷāgabēkeṁdu
dēvarige samarpista
ru I samarpisida dē
vatā Uśake Ārobba
ru Aḷupidavaru
vāraṇāsidalu ya
lli Aśaṁkhyāta kapi
le koṁda pāpake
yōharu Idhaṁ
rmava Udharisi naḍa
sidavarige Asaṁ
khyāta kapilēkoṭa
phalavahudu śrī śrī
śrī śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 17.65 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
